name: get_slrs
full_help:
get_slrs

Description: 
Get a list of slrs.

Syntax: 
get_slrs  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet]
          [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
slr

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get the slr of these device, tiles, sites, bels, sitepins, 
                 belpins, clock region, node, pip, pin, package pin, iobank, 
                 cell.
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match slr against patterns
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Device, Object, XDC
